creator: dwhite@resnet.uoregon.edu
text:
On Mon, 20 Jul 1998 FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.ORG wrote:

Please amend the patch so the boot string is 

1:wd(2,a)/kernel
 
instead.  Thanks!
